top3.sql:
SELECT 
    CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN atom.element = 'H' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) / COUNT(*) AS ratio,
    'H_ratio' AS label
FROM atom
WHERE atom.molecule_id = 'TR006';

SELECT 
    CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN atom.element = 'H' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) / COUNT(*) AS ratio,
    'H_ratio' AS label
FROM atom
WHERE atom.molecule_id = 'TR006';

SELECT 
    CAST(COUNT(*) AS REAL) / (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM atom WHERE molecule_id = 'TR006') AS ratio,
    'Hydrogen ratio' AS label
FROM atom
WHERE molecule_id = 'TR006' AND element = 'H';

SELECT 
    CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN atom.element = 'H' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) / COUNT(*) AS ratio,
    'H_ratio' AS label
FROM atom
WHERE atom.molecule_id = 'TR006';

SELECT 
    CAST(COUNT(*) AS REAL) / (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM atom WHERE molecule_id = 'TR006') AS ratio,
    'Hydrogen ratio' AS label
FROM atom
WHERE molecule_id = 'TR006' AND element = 'H';

final.sql:
SELECT 
    CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN atom.element = 'H' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) / COUNT(*) AS ratio,
    'H_ratio' AS label
FROM atom
WHERE atom.molecule_id = 'TR006';
